steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The subject Madeline L'Engle comes before the blank and comma, with the main verb begins appearing after to create a suspenseful tone... The blank must be filled with an element that modifies the subject without introducing a second main verb.

steps.title: Apply the rule and identify the correct choice
steps.content:
A present participle creates a participial phrase that modifies a noun; a finite verb introduces an independent clause.

Choice D (looking) correctly forms a participial phrase.

Choices A, B, and C introduce finite verbs that would incorrectly create two main verbs in the same clause.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
